summary: Regression testing after second batch of code-review fixes (Issues 2, 6, 11, 13, 15, 17, 18, 19, 20). All 10 feature scenarios PASS. Key fixes verified: refreshing state (no spinner flash), fetchData(false) for background mutations, useAssignmentActions/useGameActions sync functions, ROLE_HOME map, conflictUtils UTC Z-suffix + duration_mins fallback, AuthContext btoa try/catch + removed deobfuscate.

features_tested.landing_page: PASS — iWhistle 'Leadership Under Pressure' landing page renders correctly, no spinner stuck, no errors
features_tested.manager_login: PASS — Try Demo Account → Log in as Manager → redirects to /manager. btoa try/catch login working
features_tested.referee_login: PASS — Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee → redirects to /dashboard
features_tested.referee_dashboard_no_crash: PASS — Dashboard loads without crash, Games This Month shows 5
features_tested.manager_panel_8_tabs: PASS — All 8 tabs present: Tournaments, Assignments, Roster, Referees, Availability, Leaderboard, Standings, Reports. No spinner flash during tab navigation (fetchData(false) background refresh working)
features_tested.availability_conflict_warnings: PASS — conflict-summary-panel: '2 Scheduling Conflicts Detected This Week', conflict-count-badge: '2 conflicts', stat-conflicts: 'Conflicts 2'. Olivia Brooks + Jordan Ellis conflicts on Apr 9
features_tested.game_assignment_no_spinner: PASS — Found 5 assign buttons, clicked first, 10 referee options visible. No full-page spinner during or after assignment action. fetchData(false) confirmed working
features_tested.roster_tab: PASS — pending-section: 'No pending requests' + connected-section: 'My Referee Roster (3 referees)' with Demo Referee, Olivia Brooks, Jordan Ellis
features_tested.dark_mode_toggle: PASS — theme-toggle-button click adds 'dark' class to html element
features_tested.find_managers_referee: PASS — /find-managers accessible for referee role, shows 'My Current Rosters' (Demo Manager on roster) and 'Pending Requests' (Thomas Washington)

code_review_findings.issue_2_pagination_removed: VERIFIED — useDataFetching.js has no pagination state, clean implementation
code_review_findings.issue_6_refreshing_state: VERIFIED — refreshing state added to useDataFetching, exposed in DataContext value, all mutation calls use fetchData(false)
code_review_findings.issue_11_async_removed: VERIFIED — useAssignmentActions.js and useGameActions.js: all functions are synchronous (no async keywords)
code_review_findings.issue_13_role_home_map: VERIFIED — ProtectedRoute.jsx: ROLE_HOME = { manager: '/manager', referee: '/dashboard' } with ?? fallback
code_review_findings.issue_15_try_catch_notifications: VERIFIED — markNotificationRead and markAllNotificationsRead have try/catch in DataContext
code_review_findings.issue_17_utc_z_suffix: VERIFIED — conflictUtils.js toDate: returns new Date(`${dateStr}T${timeStr}Z`)
code_review_findings.issue_19_legacy_btoa: VERIFIED — AuthContext login checks: obfuscatedPassword || btoa(password) || password for backward compat
code_review_findings.issue_20_deobfuscate_removed: VERIFIED — No deobfuscate function in AuthContext.jsx
code_review_findings.minor_open_from_iter11: Dashboard.jsx line 44 still has a.referee.id without optional chaining — no crash with current mock data, low priority

critical_code_review_comments: Minor carryover: Dashboard.jsx line 44 a.referee.id should be a.referee?.id — listed in CODE_REVIEW.md but still not applied. Not crashing with current mock data.

test_credentials.manager: manager@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Manager)
test_credentials.referee: referee@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee)

mocked_apis: ALL data MOCKED via localStorage (demoDataService.js). All games/payments/messages/notifications/tournaments/referees/availability/connections mocked.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing localStorage seed data via createDemoAccounts()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend Vite React app at port 3000. All data via localStorage. All 10 features from second code-review batch (Issues 2/6/11/13/15/17/18/19/20) passing 100%. Login via Try Demo Account dialog. Conflicts visible on Availability tab after clicking next week (Apr 6-12). Today=April 5 2026. Minor: Dashboard.jsx a.referee.id still lacks optional chaining but no crash.
